name: Technical Skills
definition: Ability to apply domain-specific technical knowledge and tools to complete tasks and solve problems effectively.
behavioural_indicators: Demonstrates proficiency in required technical tools and languages
Applies technical knowledge to solve complex problems
Keeps up to date with relevant technical developments
Produces high-quality technical outputs with minimal errors
interview_angles: Ask candidate to explain a technical concept in their domain
Present a technical problem and ask for their approach
Ask about a challenging technical project they completed

name: Communication
definition: Ability to convey information clearly and effectively to diverse audiences, both verbally and in writing.
behavioural_indicators: Explains complex ideas in simple terms
interview_angles: Ask candidate to explain a technical concept to a non-technical person
Ask about a time they had to deliver difficult news to a stakeholder
Observe clarity and structure of their answers throughout the interview

name: Problem Solving
definition: Ability to identify, analyse, and resolve problems using logical reasoning and creative thinking.
behavioural_indicators: Breaks down complex problems into manageable parts
Uses data and evidence to support decisions
interview_angles: Present a case study or hypothetical scenario
Ask about the most complex problem they have solved
Ask how they approach debugging or troubleshooting

name: Leadership
definition: Ability to guide, inspire, and influence others toward achieving shared goals.
behavioural_indicators: Takes initiative and ownership of outcomes
interview_angles: Ask about a time they led a team through a challenge
Ask how they handle underperforming team members
Ask about their leadership style and philosophy

name: Teamwork
definition: Ability to collaborate effectively with others to achieve common goals.
behavioural_indicators: Adapts role within team as needed
interview_angles: Ask about a successful team project they contributed to
Ask about a conflict with a colleague and how they resolved it
Ask how they contribute to team culture

name: Adaptability
definition: Ability to adjust effectively to changing conditions, priorities, and requirements.
behavioural_indicators: Embraces change with a positive attitude
Quickly learns new tools and processes
interview_angles: Ask about a time a project changed significantly mid-way
Ask how they stay current with changes in their field
Ask about the biggest change they had to adapt to

name: Analytical Thinking
definition: Ability to gather, interpret, and apply data and evidence to reach sound conclusions.
behavioural_indicators: Presents findings clearly with supporting evidence
interview_angles: Present a dataset or scenario and ask for interpretation
Ask about a data-driven decision they made
Ask how they validate assumptions in their work

name: Stakeholder Management
definition: Ability to identify, engage, and manage relationships with key stakeholders to achieve project and organisational goals.
behavioural_indicators: Builds trust across all levels of the organisation
interview_angles: Ask about managing conflicting stakeholder expectations
Ask about engaging a difficult stakeholder
Ask how they keep stakeholders aligned on a project
